message:
feat(ext-fts5): implement real column filter evaluation in FTS5 queries

Replace stub column filter (which ignored column restrictions) with full
implementation that resolves column names to indices and threads
allowed-column constraints through evaluate_expr, evaluate_phrase, and
evaluate_near. Add validation that rejects unknown column names upfront.
Includes E2E parity test for column-scoped MATCH queries and unit tests
for column filter search and invalid column error handling. Minor rustfmt
cleanup in connection.rs statement dispatch and cached_parse_single.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
